channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tax cuts collide with inflation as voters weigh Trump’s economy in the midterms
item.description: Republicans want voters to think of working-class tax cuts when they weigh the economy and the 2025 law that President Donald Trump calls his “big beautiful bill.”

item.title: Trump’s redistricting push fizzles in South Carolina Senate but wins in Missouri’s top court
Democratic primary for Nebraska’s ‘blue dot’ US House seat is too early to call
